hooks.command: echo '[Hook] File modified — remember to run tests and linter before committing.'

hooks.prompt: Before stopping, verify: 1) All files are saved, 2) Tests pass, 3) No uncommitted changes that should be committed, 4) Sprint backlog is updated. Respond with ok if all clear.

hooks.command: echo "Session started at $(date). Current branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'not a git repo'). Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')"
